summary: DHH announces his appearance on the Danish newz.dk podcast where he discussed winning the Best Hacker award, explained Ruby on Rails, and shared future plans. The post is a brief link-sharing announcement with no substantive argument or analysis. It simply directs readers to the audio in MP3 or OGG format, noting the conversation is entirely in Danish.
key_points: DHH won a Best Hacker award and discussed it on the podcast
The interview covered the what and why of Ruby on Rails
The conversation was conducted entirely in Danish
money_quotes: I had a chat with Peter Mønnike from newz.dk yesterday about winning the Best Hacker award, the what and why of Ruby on Rails, future plans, and more.
key_insight: A brief announcement post linking to a Danish-language podcast interview about DHH's Best Hacker award and Ruby on Rails.
